title: PV Orchestrator — Multi-Agent Workflow Engine
description: Orchestrate pharmacovigilance workflows by decomposing complex PV tasks into agent-executable steps. Routes to appropriate tools for signal detection, causality assessment, regulatory reporting, and case processing. Acts as the intelligent dispatcher for the complete PV lifecycle.

tools.name: route-pv-workflow
tools.description: Given a pharmacovigilance objective, decompose it into ordered steps and identify which Station tools to call at each step. Returns a workflow plan with tool names, parameters, and expected outputs. Use this to plan a multi-step PV investigation before executing individual tools.

parameters.name: objective
parameters.description: PV objective (e.g., 'Investigate safety signal for semaglutide and pancreatitis')

tools.name: classify-pv-intent
tools.description: Classify a natural language PV query into a workflow category: signal_detection, causality_assessment, regulatory_reporting, case_processing, benefit_risk, literature_review, competitive_analysis. Returns the category and recommended tools.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Natural language PV question or request

tools.name: summarize-pv-findings
tools.description: Take raw PV data (signal scores, causality results, regulatory determinations) and produce a structured safety narrative suitable for a PSUR, DSUR, or internal safety review. Combines quantitative findings with regulatory context.

parameters.name: signal_data
parameters.description: Signal detection results (PRR, ROR, IC, EBGM scores)

parameters.name: causality_data
parameters.description: Causality assessment results (Naranjo score, WHO-UMC category)
